sys_atf_test.description: When a user with the role of requester is creating a new form the field "requested for" is filled with that user by default.
sys_atf_test.name: u_requested_for auto-populates for requester

sys_update_version.name: sys_atf_test_b23ee3f6830803105587fa96feaad340
sys_update_version.payload: <?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><record_update table="sys_atf_test"><sys_atf_test action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE"><active>true</active><copied_from display_value="Validate Fields copy">e1cd23ba83c403105587fa96feaad393</copied_from><description>When a user with the role of requester is creating a new form the field "requested for" is filled with that user by default. </description><enable_parameterized_testing>false</enable_parameterized_testing><fail_on_server_error>true</fail_on_server_error><name>u_requested_for auto-populates for requester</name><parameters/><remember/><sn_atf_tg_generated>false</sn_atf_tg_generated><sys_class_name>sys_atf_test</sys_class_name><sys_created_by>admin</sys_created_by><sys_created_on>2026-04-08 19:36:26</sys_created_on><sys_id>b23ee3f6830803105587fa96feaad340</sys_id><sys_mod_count>1</sys_mod_count><sys_name>u_requested_for auto-populates for requester</sys_name><sys_package display_value="Loaner Device Manager" source="x_1883746_loaner_0">8fa891c8836332105587fa96feaad3c5</sys_package><sys_policy/><sys_scope display_value="Loaner Device Manager">8fa891c8836332105587fa96feaad3c5</sys_scope><sys_update_name>sys_atf_test_b23ee3f6830803105587fa96feaad340</sys_update_name><sys_updated_by>admin</sys_updated_by><sys_updated_on>2026-04-08 19:37:35</sys_updated_on><test_origin>manual</test_origin></sys_atf_test><sys_variable_value action="delete_multiple" query="document_key=b23ee3f6830803105587fa96feaad340"/></record_update>
